title: Kuzan’s Place Among Blackbeard’s Crew
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Law, Bepo, York, Blackbeard, Unknown person #14 as The aftermath of Law’s clash with Blackbeard connects to Kuzan’s role in the Blackbeard Pirates and the danger surrounding Garp’s rescue mission.
scene: The aftermath of Law’s clash with Blackbeard connects to Kuzan’s role in the Blackbeard Pirates and the danger surrounding Garp’s rescue mission.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: On this day, the heart pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't go back, but trust them, Captain!! From the freezing ports of the north till now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've always survived!! None of us will let it end here!!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: So don't you dare die, Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...and get your ass back in uniform!

dialogue.speaker: Kuzan
dialogue.text: You're as direct as ever, Garp-san...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I've always loved that about you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's why I'm not gonna do any of those things.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've decided to live life on my own terms!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: tenth captain of the blackbeard pirates KUZAN

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your number one protege versus your new favorite. Can you kill one to save the other?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't stop me like that, you dumbass!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I THOUGHT I TAUGHT YOU TO ‘ LIVE IN THE NOW!’

summary: This part advances the Winner Island and Hachinosu Fallout through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
